name: Lakadganj Residences
description: Smartly designed apartments with reliable construction and modern amenities.

name: Infinity Punayashlok
fullDescription:
Earthquake-resistant R.C.C. structure built with red clay bricks
Premium false ceilings provided in all rooms and common areas
Designer modular kitchen with multi-functional trolley sections
Advanced 3-tier security with 24/7 CCTV and fire safety systems
High-capacity 8-passenger lift with Automatic Rescue Device
Excellent connectivity with proximity to two Metro stations

name: Infinity Glory
description: Codename Nagpur N.O.W. represents a pinnacle of luxury waterfront living in India’s fastest-growing investment corridor. Perfectly positioned next to the Samruddhi Expressway and the New Nagpur IBFC, this development offers an exclusive opportunity to buy a plot in Nagpur designed for the discerning investor. It is the definitive choice for those seeking high-end property in Nagpur with exponential appreciation potential.
